manifest.description: Tutorial, easy, medium, and showcase puzzles for the local MVP.
manifest.solution_data_notice: SolutionDTO data is local-MVP/dev convenience data only and is not valid for competitive, paid, rewarded, or server-authoritative modes.
manifest.title: StoStone Starter Pack

tutorial.message: Use room numbers as exact shaded-cell counts before testing the full drop.
Shaded cells may touch inside a room, but they cannot touch across a room border.
Shade a connected shape inside each numbered room, then check how the stones fall.
